description: list matching on-screen window ids before capturing (read-only, macOS)
rules: read-only — writes one text report (windows.txt) under record_store
SHOT_APP filters by app name (substring); empty lists all matching windows
macOS-only live; off macOS or offline the core runs in CODEX_SCREENSHOT_TEST_MODE and emits a fixture listing
usage: Optionally set SHOT_APP (app-name substring). Output: windows.txt.
limitation: Live window enumeration is macOS-only and needs swift + Screen Recording permission. With those absent it degrades to a deterministic fixture listing.
